name: AuraSound Pro X1 Wireless Headphones
description: Premium over-ear wireless headphones with adaptive noise cancellation, 40-hour battery life, Hi-Res Audio support, and memory foam cushions. Features Bluetooth 5.3 and multipoint connection for seamless device switching.

name: Velocity UltraBook 15 Pro
description: Ultra-thin 15.6-inch laptop with 14th Gen Intel Core i9 processor, 32GB DDR5 RAM, 1TB NVMe SSD, and NVIDIA RTX 4060 GPU. 2.8K OLED display with 120Hz refresh rate.

name: NexaFit Smartwatch Series 5
description: Advanced health-tracking smartwatch with ECG monitoring, blood oxygen saturation, sleep analysis, and GPS. Titanium case with sapphire crystal display, 7-day battery life.

name: CloudView 4K Smart Monitor 32
description: 32-inch 4K UHD monitor with USB-C PD 90W, built-in webcam, speakers, and KVM switch. IPS panel with 99% DCI-P3 color accuracy. Ideal for remote work and creative professionals.

name: SwiftCharge 200W GaN Charger
description: Compact 200W gallium-nitride charger with 4 ports (2x USB-C, 2x USB-A). Supports PD 3.1 and QC 5.0. Can charge a laptop, phone, and tablet simultaneously.

name: AuraSound Mini Earbuds
description: Compact true wireless earbuds with spatial audio, adaptive transparency mode, and IPX5 sweat resistance. 8-hour playtime with 30-hour charging case.

name: Velocity WorkStation Tower
description: Professional desktop workstation with AMD Ryzen 9 7950X, 64GB DDR5 ECC RAM, dual 2TB NVMe SSDs in RAID 0, and NVIDIA RTX A5000 GPU. Built for 3D rendering and AI workloads.

name: SecureVault 5TB Portable SSD
description: Military-grade encrypted portable SSD with 5TB capacity and 2000 MB/s read speed. IP68 dust and waterproof rating with hardware AES-256 encryption.

name: PixelPro Creator Tablet 12.9
description: 12.9-inch creative tablet with 4096 pressure levels stylus, 2K display at 144Hz, and Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 processor. Runs desktop-class creative apps.

name: HomeLink Mesh Router System
description: Wi-Fi 7 mesh router system covering up to 9,000 sq ft. Tri-band with 10Gbps aggregate speed, supports 200+ devices. Built-in VPN and parental controls.

name: ErgoPro Standing Desk Frame
description: Electric standing desk frame with programmable height memory, anti-collision system, and whisper-quiet dual motors. Supports up to 350 lbs, height range 24-50 inches.

name: ClearCam 4K Webcam Pro
description: 4K webcam with auto-framing AI, dual stereo microphones, and background blur. Sony STARVIS sensor for excellent low-light performance. Works with Zoom, Teams, and OBS.

name: NexaFit Smart Scale Pro
description: Wi-Fi connected smart scale measuring 14 body composition metrics including body fat %, muscle mass, bone density, and metabolic age. Syncs with Apple Health and Google Fit.

name: AuraSound Soundbar X3
description: Dolby Atmos soundbar with wireless subwoofer. 7.1.4 channel system with up-firing speakers for immersive 3D audio. eARC, Spotify Connect, and AirPlay 2 support.

name: Velocity Gaming Laptop 17
description: 17.3-inch gaming laptop with Intel Core i9-14900HX, 64GB DDR5, 2TB SSD, and NVIDIA RTX 4090 Laptop GPU. 240Hz QHD display with G-Sync. Per-key RGB mechanical keyboard.

name: SmartGrow Indoor Garden Kit
description: Automated indoor garden with full-spectrum LED grow lights, self-watering system, and app-controlled nutrients. Grows herbs, lettuce, and tomatoes year-round. 12 pod capacity.

name: CloudView Curved Ultrawide 34
description: 34-inch curved ultrawide WQHD monitor. 1000R curvature, 165Hz refresh, 1ms response time. HDR600 certified with quantum dot technology. Ideal for gaming and productivity.

name: AirPure HEPA Smart Purifier
description: Room air purifier with H14 HEPA filter, activated carbon layer, and UV-C sterilization. Covers 750 sq ft, real-time PM2.5 monitoring, auto-adjusts fan speed based on air quality.

name: SecureVault Docking Station Pro
description: Thunderbolt 4 docking station with 16 ports including dual 4K HDMI, 10GbE Ethernet, SD/microSD readers, and 96W laptop charging. Compatible with Windows, macOS, and Linux.

name: QuantumKey Mechanical Keyboard
description: 75% wireless mechanical keyboard with hot-swappable switches, gasket mount design, and south-facing RGB. Triple connectivity (2.4GHz, Bluetooth, USB-C). PBT double-shot keycaps.
